---
title: "How to Host OSRM on Amazon EC2 Server"
date: "2017-02-25"
author: "Kivan Polimis"
description: ""
categories: [how-to]
image: ""
draft: true
---

{% notebook google_location_history.ipynb cells[1:7] %}

{% notebook google_location_history.ipynbcells[12:] %}

-->
